description: Blocks mutating kubectl commands targeting prod contexts or namespaces.

hooks.statusMessage: Checking for mutating kubectl in prod context

hooks.command: CTX=$(kubectl config current-context 2>/dev/null || echo none); CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command'); if echo "$CTX" | grep -qiE '(prod|production|live)' && echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'kubectl\s+(delete|apply|replace|patch|scale|rollout\s+restart|drain)'; then exit 1; fi
